reviews.text:
We all hope to never need an attorney, but “life happens”.  If you’re reading this review, life has probably put you in the position of needing an attorney.  Your first choice should absolutely be George Altgelt and Altgelt Law.

George Altgelt is not only a fantastic attorney, he’s an outstanding person.  When you have legal issues, there’s a very good chance you have some underlying personal issues as well.  On more than one occasion he’s gone out of his way to speak to me as a friend and counselor during times of stress.

Even members of the law enforcement community have things go wrong in life.  As law enforcement, legal issues can greatly impact our career.  Myself being someone who works in law enforcement,  George worked to resolve my legal issues extremely quickly, this allowed me to be cleared by my agency, and return to full duty much faster than many of my colleagues who decided to hire other law firms.

In the world of attorneys,  you get what you pay for.  You could choose someone with a smaller retainer, but you’ll end up paying for it in the long run.

Our office made multiple attempts to work out a payment arrangement on your pending case. Unfortunately, when the agreed-upon payments were not completed, we were ethically required to withdraw, which is standard procedure under our contract and State Bar guidelines.

You later requested to apply previous payments toward a different legal matter, our retention agreement does not allow us to transfer funds paid for one case to an unrelated service. We understand this was frustrating, but we must follow the terms of the contract and ethical rules that govern our practice.

We truly wish you the best moving forward and remain committed to assisting clients with transparency and professionalism.

reviews.text: Tried to charge 3500$ for simple traffic representing in court. Predatory charges especially for a CDL driver. Should be ashamed

There’s nothing simple about a CDL traffic violation. The only way to address those issues is to request a jury trial. You’re out of your mind if you think I’m going to go to trial for less than $3,500.00. You’re also free to secure the services of any other lawyer you want. The only person that should be ashamed is you for trashing a business’s prices when you’re the one that sought my services.

We charge $200 for consultations, so I have a policy specifically for CDL holders where we quote them without the consultations in case you don’t want to pay that fee. You hung up on my assistant that was trying to explain that you. You were never our client, and you never will be.

reviews.text: I recieved a speeding ticket and didn’t know how to proceed.  I’m in the military and just moved here and I still had my drivers licience from another state. Then I recieved a letter in the mail from Mr. Ramos’s office.  I question if it was litgtimate so I called his office to confirm.  He took the time to reassure me and walked me through the process of requesting his services online.  Once I had completed the online application I recieved an email that the ticket would be resolved and I should be receiving the documents reporting the outcome in 7-10 days.  I was surprised to receive an email from his office 4 days later with the final outcome stating that the citation would not go on my record and I did not have to complete drivers safety course.  If you get a ticket this is the law office you should contact to best represent you!

Thank you for your comment. We note that this review was posted by a third party rather than the client themselves.

Our attorney is directly responsible for legal strategy, court appearances, and advocacy. Since this review was left under two different names, I will provide the same response to both.

I take great pride in my integrity and professionalism, particularly when serving in sensitive court-appointed roles where I am tasked with protecting a child’s best interest—not advocating for either parent. These cases can be emotional, and it is not uncommon for someone to become upset when they disagree with a recommendation made in that capacity.

While I cannot confirm or deny representation due to confidentiality obligations, I can say confidently that this review contains inaccuracies. We do not charge $500 for any consultation or private legal service. That figure reflects a court-ordered retainer, not a fee paid voluntarily or for personal representation.

It is disappointing to see someone attempt to damage a professional reputation in this way, particularly when no attorney-client relationship existed. Still, I am always open to respectful discussion. If you have concerns, call my office at (956) 717-8200.
— Joey Tellez

reviews.text: I’m incredibly thankful to Mr. Barrio and Mrs. Nunez Mtz for their support during a time when I felt completely overwhelmed. Being in an accident is stressful enough, but I feared everything that would come after would be even more difficult. Thankfully, they stepped in with professionalism, care, and a genuine concern for my well-being. They handled everything smoothly and took the weight off my shoulders. I truly appreciate how they managed my accident case from start to finish.

I had a car accident and I desperately need the money, and even after they called me, told me they got a settlement.

Yet It’s been at least 3 months since I heard the insurance made what seemed to be a final offer but almost a total of 2 years since I first had called asking for an attorney to represent me! and I need my settlement!

I will say that I've only worked with Jackie from the front desk and every time I called she seemed to convey the urgency of my message and understands very well. she is fantastic.

They won’t ever call me back, they won’t answer my calls, they won’t update me at all. They say next week or, we’ll call you in a week. All lies. Never follow through on their word. I’m debating on driving to Laredo just to get a response.

UPDATE- ive been working with them since the day i left the review, it might have been my fault as i was calling an older phone number for a while. they are in contact and they promised me they would wire the money direct to my account
...we will see if they stand on their word... 2/14/25 -  2:07pm

-2/15/25 - 10am they came through! They wired the money direct to my account this morning because I needed it bad by tomorrow! They came through!, what started off as a slow process. Finally worked out. Complete 180* from my initial experience.
Unfortunately he can't help but he still charged. Disappointed 😞

If I could put zero stars I would. Mr. Del Barrio knew ZERO information about my situation when we went to court because he’d never pick up the phone or set up a meeting with me. He completely did not care or have any interest to help me with my case. It was a complete waste of money. After the court orders & after the court date, I’d call him he’d never answer or he’d send a text. Tell me he’d get back to me, nothing. Practically two years later, I’m struggling with the father of my children because Mr. Del Barrio was not thorough enough to include important information into the court orders that I didn’t realize how important would be till now I’m struggling with. All my friends & family have very detailed court orders with the ex’s but mine does not. Detailed as in phone calls, as in if the ex can not pick up the child there is assigned family members to do so, instead of some random friend ex does coke with. But AGAIN those are all details I’ve seen in other court orders. I wasted my money, anyone who will ask me I will always say DO NOT GO WITH GULLERMO DEL BARRIO, waste of your money!!
Great Attorney! Recommend

Yall failed my friend that’s ridiculous how you take so much money from these people and ghost them…

If I could give ZERO stars I would. I'm extremely disappointed with the service I received from Mr. Santos and his law firm. Despite being eager to work with me initially, he failed to deliver on his promises. Communication was poor, and I often had to reach out multiple times to get updates on my case. Documents were sent to opposing counsel without my review or approval, and I was left in the dark about the status of my case.

The final court date had to be pushed back because my counter-proposal was never sent to opposing counsel, despite my repeated emails and calls. After the court date, I never heard from Mr. Santos again and had to rely on checking the court records to find out what had happened. It's unacceptable that I was not informed about the outcome of my case or given the opportunity to review and sign any agreements. I don’t even have a copy of my custody orders or the outcome because I was essentially ghosted by the lawyer firm following that rescheduled court date.

Given the $4,500 retainer fee I paid, I expected a much higher level of service. It's unfortunate that Mr. Santos's actions fell so short of my expectations. I would not recommend this law firm to anyone. I will now be having to save money to rehire a lawyer to actually help me with my child custody case.

If I could give them negative stars I would. Terrible communication and charged me a 6500$ retainer to file 3 documents and never even appeared in court. I could never get a hold of Mr Santos again and they took forever to make changes on my divorce decree. She wanted me to sign but there was something on the fine print that I did not agree with. Time passed and I finally decided to follow up because they never did and I just signed to get it over with. Cyndi told me that after being signed the process would be fast . It’s been a little over a month now and still nothing. I have to call like 5 times and even had to use someone else’s phone before they answered and when they do it’s always a lady named Cyndi with an extremely terrible attitude. This time she told me that i just signed and it would take some time . My ex wife’s lawyer reached out to us and said Mr Santos ‘s office has not turned in the signed decree to the judge. They have no paperwork from me ! I tell her I want to speak to Mr Santos and she just tells me he will return my phone call and never does ! I called today and was extremely upset but never used foul language what I said was “this is totally B.S”. exactly like that two letters. Now she sends me an email that they were waiting for me to sign but I never did til now , that next time I call I shouldn’t use foul language towards them and I should be more professional.How was I going to sign something I did not agree with?? I told them I didn’t agree and they never sent updated documents. She emailed me today that JUST TODAY they sent decree to opposing counsel!!! Why just today??? When I signed over a month ago!

The first attorney saw a traumatized middle aged woman being forced into a divorce and had absolutely no compassion and offered no hope in a divorce settlement.   After his very negative thoughts on the outcome of my divorce, I almost succumbed to my narcissistic husband’s push for mediation and his demands. Thank God I called Mr Santos!  After talking to his staff and having a one hour zoom meeting with Mr Santos, I knew that he was the attorney God had lead me to. I cannot express strongly enough the quality of work and the solid legal advice I have received.   Mr Santos and his entire staff have become like family -
encouraging me along the way and always having my best interest in mind.  They are always quick to respond to questions and willing to spend whatever time is necessary to explain all legal matters to me.  No one wants to have to hire an attorney, but if you do, I highly recommend Mr Santos - his genuineness  of character, calm demeanor and legal expertise will guide you successfully through the legal difficulty you find yourself in.

reviews.text:
When you start a family, you hope to never have to need a family law attorney to help with the custody
of your child. Unfortunately, that is where I landed. It was such a stressful and overwhelming decision in
choosing an attorney with integrity, who is honest, and will fight hard for you (and your child) like family.
From the first phone call we made to the Law Offices of Rudy Santos, his paralegal team answered all our
questions and guided us through this process. Upon our first meeting with Mr. Santos, his passion for is
work and vast array of knowledge was so apparent. I was put at such ease, knowing that he had mine and
my child's best interest in mind. I felt as if he treated me like family. I have always been told that custody
battles tend to drag on for months and sometimes years, however, that was not the case with Mr. Santos.
He is diligent and professional. I never once felt like I was being taken advantage of by Mr. Santos and his
team. He was both vigilant and respectful of my time and my money. I greatly appreciated that Mr.
Santos and his team kept in regularly communication with me as my case progressed. It did not matter
what time of day I called with questions, someone was always available to take my call. When it comes
to obtaining custody of your child, days can feel like years, but Mr. Santos and his team kept me abreast
every step of the way. He is a very knowledgeable attorney and always explained all my options as my
case evolved. I always felt well informed with the help of Mr. Santos' legal guidance. I am certain that as
a result of Mr. Santos' knowledge, professionalism, honesty, and passion for his work, I ended up winning
my custody case. Now my family is truly complete and I owe it to the great team at the Law Offices of
Rudy Santos.

The Law Offices of Rudy Santos should be made an example for law firms nationwide. They allowed me to be involved in every single aspect of my case and never left me in the dark. This happened from the very first phone call made all the way to the resolution. Both Rudy and his staff have great communication and showed nothing but passion for the work they did for me. He was always available to answer any of my questions and gave my case the attention it needed day or night. This level of service did not stop with Rudy! His wife Cindy who is his right hand also knew my case inside and out and was there to answer absolutely any question I had when Rudy was in a trial and at times the voice of reason I needed. They not only provided the best service I have ever received but were empathetic to my budget and legal needs. I can honestly say that after working with them any negativity I had towards lawyers has changed and will only use them as my representation from here and out! The world needs more lawyers in this world that hold themself up to Rudy’s high level of professionalism and integrity!

I called with some basic questions, at first she was very nice. She told hme the retainer fee to file for divorce, etc etc. Call was going great, she even referred me to downtown since I mentioned that my income isn't all too great. Once I said that I can't afford the 3k, she hung up on me mid sentence. Pretty rude, considering that income tax is around, the corner and I probably would have considered them. Not anymore.

Highly recommended!!!

I would HIGHLY recommend Rudy Santos to anyone that needs legal advice. He truly strives to treat his clients like family and he puts every effort into guiding you with the best legal advice. Also, he works for justice and not just for money. I guarantee that if you choose to use Rudy Santos, you won't be disappointed!
For my family and I will never be able to express our gratitude we have towards him and his team!!

The entire process was incredibly fast, the service was excellent, they answered all my questions and exceeded my expectations. Thank you!

reviews.text:
In April of 2024, I Alejandra Palomo, was involved in a car accident with an at-fault tractor in Laredo, Texas.  My toddler and teenager were riding in the vehicle with me.  Unbeknown to me, I was also several weeks pregnant with my now 1 year old son.  Adrenaline drowned the pain and I immediately began to check on the well-being of my sons.  In the middle of all the chaos, I was able to get a hold of my phone and contacted the offices of the Gonzalez Druker Law Firm.  Mr. Druker immediately took charge of the situation, scheduling emergency room visits for myself and children.
Following the accident, Mr. Druker began scheduling follow-up doctors visits to assess the physical and psychological damage suffered by my family due to the accident.  Mr. Druker also took over communication with the trucking company and their insurance provider.  For months, Mr. Druker continued to check up on my family and provided constant communication with case updates.
In December of 2024, I gave birth to my son, and the labor made it clear how much physical damage I had suffered due to the accident.  I had a very complicated delivery but through the grace of God my child and I were able to make it home.
Although I continue to bare with the physical pain and PTSD suffered during the accident, Mr. Druker was able to secure my family a very fair monetary compensation that will help supplement some of the abilities I have lost for good.  The Gonzalez Druker Law Firm was the one bright spot of a nightmare situation.  I will forever be grateful for all the help and compassion that the Gonzalez Druker Law Firm provided me in my time of need.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the detailed review. The team at the Gonzalez Druker law Firm will always fight for the best results. Thank you for trusting us with your case. We are always here to help and it was a great pleasure to serve you.

I had the pleasure of working with the Lazcano Law Firm, and I cannot recommend their services highly enough. From the moment I first contacted them about my case, I was impressed by the importance they placed on my situation. The staff and legal team at Lazcano Law Firm are truly exceptional - always on top of things and dedicated to achieving the best possible outcome for their clients.

I am particularly grateful to Sam Gutierrez, a legal assistant at the firm, whose constant updates and genuine concern for my well-being during the recovery process following my accident made all the difference. Sam made sure I was informed about every step and direction they were taking with my case, ensuring that I never felt lost or alone in what can be an overwhelming and stressful process.

Thanks to the Lazcano Law Firm and Sam's support, my experience with my case was not just about representation but about feeling like they were actively protecting my best interests. If you are in need of legal assistance, I wholeheartedly recommend the Lazcano Law Firm for their exceptional service, caring staff, and unwavering dedication to their clients.
Best attorney I have worked with! Received more money than I was expecting for my case.

I called to see if they could get a case. The receptionist passed the call to another lady. I explained  to her the situation, and she mentioned Mr. Lezcano only gets cases of major catastrophe. The vehicle had to be in an almost totaled state as to my understanding. I asked some other questions, which, to my surprise, I realized  she had hunged up on me. She was so nice and polite at first. As soon as she saw there was no case, she just decided to hang up. So sad to see that there are people out there who get paid for their customer service, which is a major factor in a law firm of this category, yet they lack all of it. All my reviews are honest, and the reason why I take the time to do them is to give people insight into what my experience was and so they can know what to expect. I want to clarify this review is on my  customer service experience  on this specific individual. I think a little empathy and better communication skills would be of great help. If I ever find myself in need of  a lawyer, I will definitely look elsewhere.
Signed for 40% attorney fee and was charged 45%.

reviews.text: Very disappointing customer service. My mom has been waiting for my grandpa's will to be finalized since May 2022, apparently the usual timeline is 3-4 months. I'm writing this in January 2023 because the lady had lost a critical document after insisting that my mom send in the original paper file, so there's not even a copy available for use. This mess-up has severely delayed the process. Last week, the lady told her it'll be another "couple months" before the money comes in. My mom needs this money to help pay for my wedding that's happening in June, and anyone who has ever planned a wedding before knows that these expenses incur WAY ahead of time. My own needs aside - the process should not have taken this long in the first place.
reviews.ownerResponse: Miss Guardiola, may I first express my condolences for the loss of your grandfather. Family bonds create lasting memories and your fondest memories should be at the forefront of your mind. Secondly, congratulations on your nuptials. The sacrament of marriage is precious and allows us to grow with the ability to share compassion and show patience to one another, which is a gift. Allow me to address your concerns. It is correct that his probate process has taken longer than usual, however, the fact of the matter is that none of the documents in this matter were missing. We make it a point and stress that original documents, like wills, should not be unstapled. The will we received was unstapled, and the document in question was in the wrong place, in the middle of the document and for that reason, it was not accepted by the courts, in which we took alternative action to remedy the situation and to satisfy the judges requirements. That is where we are right now and the probate case continues to move forward. These types of things do happen, albeit, they are outliers and not a common occurrence. That withstanding, our team of professionals have been working closely with your family to help facilitate the probate process because we want a resolution as much as you and your family do. Another misconception we that the probate process only takes 3-4 months. Unfortunately, after Covid, this is no longer the case and there continues to be a slowdown as you can imagine, many people suffered and lost loved ones and the courts are still recovering from this. We have seen this in several counties in Texas and is not exclusive to our area. I am aware that this has caused this delay in the probate process of your grandfather's estate and it is unfortunate. I do ask that you consider compassion and patience and I will pray that this matter resolves as soon possible and we wish you all the best and the most wonderful outcome for your upcoming wedding day. Best to you, Catalina Dickerson, Office Manager

reviews.ownerResponse: Good morning, Mr. Camarillo. We are deeply sorry for your family member's situation. The $600.00 fee includes a visit from an attorney (not a paralegal) to your family member at one of the six detention centers that U.S. Immigration currently operates in the region in and around Laredo, Texas. Entering one of these detention centers takes a lot of time and security measures. The detention centers are full of foreigners seeking asylum in the United States. The purpose of our attorneys' visit is to evaluate your family member's asylum case. The current political climate in our country regarding asylum is very difficult, and most asylum cases are being denied. In certain cases, there is nothing that can be done, since the person does not qualify for asylum. The legal recommendation is given to the detained person. The detained person decides whether they wish to stop their deportation, despite our attorneys' recommendation. The $600 fee includes submitting the documentation required by the Department of Homeland Security (ICE) to stop the deportation and obtain a court hearing for the individual. However, continuing with court representation requires an additional fee. Each case is different. Please contact our office at (956) 726-0700 if you would like to discuss your family member's case further. Thank you.

reviews.text: I called because a family member was detained and I needed some information. Jessica, the person that answered, was rude and told me she couldn't help me and hung up on me. Fortunately, my relative was released but the information that I was given helped us out a lot. Claudia and Alexandra were professional, understanding and helpful. It is important to understand that asylum in the United States is a very difficult way to enter this country due to many legal, political, logistical, and individual factors specific to each case. The jurisdiction in which the person's case is located also plays a significant role, as certain areas of the United States may be considered more anti-immigrant than others. I felt terrible because at the first interview I had the money and paperwork ready, and they just took information from me and didn't take me seriously. I went in with high hopes and a positive attitude, and they treated me horribly. After knocking on so many doors, I finally got it within a month. The fear my family felt regarding all the new immigration regulations was suffocating us, and we no longer knew what to do. I heard about the lawyer through various recommendations and on social media. That's when I decided to schedule a consultation with them.

It's worth noting that our process was lengthy, but even so, they explained every question we had in detail.

I couldn't recommend anyone other than lawyer Yohana Saucedo. The peace of mind, tranquility, and freedom they provided my family are incomparable.

To be honest, in my experience, I was a little apprehensive at first, given the current situation with the new administration, but I have nothing but praise for the lawyer and the paralegals who were always there to answer my questions and provide me with peace of mind during the many crises my family and I faced.

I can confirm that I noticed a genuine desire to help, and as a Christian, my family and the firm's staff placed everything in God's hands, always with the utmost respect.

My experience with Attorney Saucedo's law firm has been extremely disappointing. The service has been terrible, marked by negligence, a lack of communication, and broken promises from the very beginning.

I have two cases with this firm, and in both, I've received the exact same treatment:
• They promise to notify me of things they never do.

• They say they'll send documents for a case that's already been paid for, and nothing ever arrives.

• There's no follow-up, no accountability, and no professionalism.

• I've waited weeks for them to send me some items needed for my mother's biometric fingerprinting… and nothing.

• Every time I ask, it's just another excuse.

Furthermore, there's no communication within the firm itself. About four different people have handled my cases, and none of them know the status of the process. Not even the attorney herself: she's been notified several times, and she only responds that "someone from her office will be in touch," which never happens.

In short: they don't keep their word, and I wouldn't recommend this place to anyone. The lack of attention and follow-up is constant and frustrating. After so much time and so many obstacles, the least one expects is professionalism… but it's simply not there.

—

I highly recommend her services to anyone who needs legal support with immigration matters. We can’t recommend the Law Office of Fred Treviño highly enough to anyone going through the adoption process.
